requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024 Baseline vs Bahrain Expectations
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024基准与巴林要求对比
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024基準與巴林要求對比

summary.en: Bahrain does not publish a list of Chinese GB/T standards that it formally accepts as equivalent to IEC or GSO standards for solar PV inverters. Project owners, EWA-approved consultants, lenders, and insurers in Bahrain will typically look for IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 accredited test reports and EWA material-approval listing rather than China GB/T documentation.
summary.zh: 巴林未发布正式接受中国GB/T标准等同于光伏逆变器IEC或GSO标准的清单。巴林项目业主、EWA认可顾问、贷款方和保险方通常要求IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2认可测试报告和EWA物料认可备案，而非中国GB/T文件。
summary.zht: 巴林未發布正式接受中國GB/T標準等同於光伏逆變器IEC或GSO標準的清單。巴林項目業主、EWA認可顧問、貸款方和保險方通常要求IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2認可測試報告和EWA物料認可備案，而非中國GB/T文件。

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2019 covers technical specifications for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters for the China market, including safety, EMC, and grid-interaction requirements. GB/T 19964-2024 sets technical requirements for connecting photovoltaic power stations to power systems. Both documents use Chinese language and Chinese grid parameters and are not direct IEC 62109 equivalents.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2019涵盖中国市场光伏并网逆变器的技术规范，包括安全、EMC和并网交互要求。GB/T 19964-2024规定了光伏发电站接入电力系统的技术要求。两份文件均采用中文，使用中国电网参数，不是IEC 62109的直接等效文件。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2019涵蓋中國市場光伏併網逆變器的技術規範，包括安全、EMC和併網交互要求。GB/T 19964-2024規定了光伏發電站接入電力系統的技術要求。兩份文件均採用中文，使用中國電網參數，不是IEC 62109的直接等效文件。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause gap analysis between GB/T 37408-2019 and IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2. Where gaps exist, obtain supplementary accredited-lab testing against IEC 62109. Translate critical documentation into English for EWA and project-owner review. Do not submit China-language GB/T test reports alone as the compliance basis for Bahrain projects.
gap.zh: 准备GB/T 37408-2019与IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2之间的逐条差距分析。存在差距处，取得针对IEC 62109的补充认可实验室测试。将关键文件翻译为英文供EWA和项目业主审查。不得仅以中文GB/T测试报告作为巴林项目的合规依据。
gap.zht: 準備GB/T 37408-2019與IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2之間的逐條差距分析。存在差距處，取得針對IEC 62109的補充認可實驗室測試。將關鍵文件翻譯為英文供EWA和項目業主審查。不得僅以中文GB/T測試報告作為巴林項目的合規依據。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62109 evidence mandatory for EWA material-approval listing; GB/T reports alone not accepted
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended standard for China domestic market; mandatory requirements depend on product certification route and contract

source.publisher: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD), Ministry of Industry and Commerce

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024 documentation supports internal technical due diligence but is not accepted as a standalone compliance basis for Bahrain's EWA material-approval or project requirements. IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 accredited test reports are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024文件可支持内部技术尽调，但不能作为巴林EWA物料认可或项目要求的独立合规依据。须提供IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2认可测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024文件可支持內部技術盡調，但不能作為巴林EWA物料認可或項目要求的獨立合規依據。須提供IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2認可測試報告。
